text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove keeps nodding off during training
today...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. Could you repeat that explanation
once more?
choice_data_list: Are you okay? You seem a bit... off.
Are you okay? You seem a bit... off.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been getting much sleep lately. The
student council work keeps piling up.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I decided to do a little before bed, but before I
realized it, the sun was up.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All the same, the work needs to be done. Don't
worry—none of this should be of your concern.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove casually brushes it off, but she's
clearly exhausted. I should keep this in mind.
